title: Minimalist Meditation Nook with Cushion and Candles
description: Square format image of a serene and minimalist meditation space at home featuring a comfortable beige meditation cushion, a round cushion on top, a small indoor plant in a ceramic pot, three lit candles on a wooden tray, and soft natural light coming through a window. The setting includes calming neutral tones, a woven rug on wooden flooring, and beige curtains, creating a peaceful and inviting atmosphere for mindfulness and relaxation.
